title: Software Quality Issues in the U.S. Cost an Estimated $2.41 Trillion in 2022
text: Synopsys-sponsored CISQ report finds existing vulnerabilities, software supply chain complexities and growing impact of technical debt as key drivers of increased cyberattacks, cost MOUNTAIN VIEW, Calif. , Dec. 6, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Synopsys, Inc. (Nasdaq: SNPS) today revealed that software quality issues may have held the U.S. economy back to the tune of $2.41 trillion in 2022.
